episodes.title: 62. Niko's Story: Inside the Peach House Cult Part 2
episodes.description: Growing up in a cult can be a confusing and painful experience, filled with complex dynamics that shape a child's understanding of family, faith, and freedom. In today's episode, former member Niko shares part 2 of his story about life inside the Peach House cult in Portland, Oregon. You'll gain insights into how such environments manipulate beliefs and relationships, and what it means for those who escape. Angela's Ppodcast about the Peach House Cult - Squirrel Brain Stories: https://open.spotify.com/show/3ExeitUrpNJD0f8gEyQwNv?si=3FGLmSGkRZ-lp3HbUxF0Nw Suicide & Crisis Lifeline: Call or text 988 from any phone in the United States Training Institute on Strangulation Prevention: https://www.strangulationtraininginstitute.com/ American Foundation for Suicide Prevention: https://afsp.org/ Rape, Abuse and Incest National Network (RAINN): https://www.rainn.org/ National Center for Victims of Crime: https://victimsofcrime.org Victim Connect Resource Center: https://victimconnect.org National Crime Victim Bar Association: https://victimbar.org Substance Abuse and Mental Health Service Administration (SAMHSA): https://www.samhsa.gov/find-help/national-helpline National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI): https://www.nami.org/help HOW TO REACH US: Gmail: forensicnursefilespod@gmail.com IG/Facebook: @forensicnursefiles Tiktok: @forensicnursefilespod Are you a nurse or healthcare provider in the forensics field? Are you a victim of assault? Reach out to us! We would love to feature you or your story anonymously on an episode!
